purpose: Review-stage participant/alumni candidate inventory extracted from bold-docs/samples. This is not public site content.

notes: Candidate records are approved for public-safe profile publication.
Contact details, addresses, dates of birth, emergency contacts, allergies, and family details remain intentionally omitted.
Bios are concise public summaries derived from source documents and product-owner approval.

approval.scope: All candidate profiles and all named participants approved for public-safe profile publication.
approval.mediaNote: Photos are approved for public preview use by all visible adults. Names/profiles for every visible person are pending.
